en-US.title: The SHED
en-US.subtitle: Reimbursements & Approvals
en-US.description:
The SHED is the SOW reimbursement and expense management app — built to take the friction out of getting paid back.

Submit a request in seconds, then watch it move through your organisation's approval chain automatically. Department heads, budget managers, directors, and finance all get notified at the right moment, so nothing sits in anyone's inbox forgotten.

—

KEY FEATURES

• Multi-level approvals — requests route through Head of Department → Budget Manager → Director (for larger amounts) → Finance, in order, with no steps skipped
• Real-time notifications — push alerts and email at every action so approvers never miss their turn
• Receipt & payment tracking — finance submits proof of payment per recipient, with a full audit trail
• Comment threads — discuss a request inline, with emoji reactions and unread counts
• Role-based access — staff, heads of department, heads of division, directors, and admins each see exactly what they need
• Annual rollover — org structure and in-flight requests carry over automatically on 1 September
• Universal links — tap a notification email and land directly on the right request

—

Designed for SOW staff. Sign in with your sow.org.au Google account to get started.
